iterations.theme: Devotion to St. Joseph and Personal Testimony of Faith
iterations.reason_for_cut: This iteration encompasses the entire podcast episode, which is a continuous segment focused on prayer and a personal testimony related to St. Joseph.

chapters.topic: Opening Prayers (Our Father, Hail Mary, Creed)
Litany of the Immaculate Heart of St. Joseph
Prayer to St. Joseph and Confession of Faith
Introduction of Ruža and Her Testimony
Ruža's Journey with St. Joseph and Challenges
Importance of Prayer and Faith in Adversity (War, Personal Loss)
Faith vs. Human Expectations and Consistency in Devotion
Role of St. Joseph as a Guide and Universal Saint
Clarification on Hierarchy of Saints and St. Joseph's Role
Closing Remarks and Promotion of Devotion to St. Joseph
